_comment: BUG->CHECK rule registry — each P0/P1 bug maps to one structured check rule

rules.message: confirm/reject/defer action requires a valid stock code
confirm/reject action must include a decision note
rules.fix_hint: Write at least one sentence explaining the reason

rules.message: Note is too short (< 10 chars); recommend adding more context for review
rules.fix_hint: Expand note to include signal source, risk points, and time window

rules.message: No evidence source provided; conclusion traceability is low
rules.fix_hint: Fill in evidence source field, e.g. multi-role analysis run_id=xxx

rules.message: Action submitted via manual entry without linked upstream module
rules.fix_hint: Navigate to decision board from signal graph, news analysis, or multi-role analysis

rules.message: No snapshot date; action timestamp will be used as decision date
rules.fix_hint: Click 'Generate Snapshot' before submitting to bind to a specific snapshot

rules.message: Action source is manual input; verify context is complete
rules.fix_hint: Use the arrow button from analysis results page to carry context automatically
